welcome.line2: Your account has been created successfully.
welcome.line3: In this chat, we will send important platform notifications.

authCode.subject: TyPlace — verification code
authCode.text:
Your TyPlace verification code: {{code}}

If this was not you, just ignore this email.

start.connected: TyPlace Telegram bot is connected. Return to the site: Profile → Notifications → Telegram.
start.invalidLink: The link is invalid or expired. Open TyPlace and request a new Telegram link.
start.userNotFound: TyPlace user not found. Request a new link on the website.
start.alreadyLinked: This Telegram account is already linked to another TyPlace account.
start.success: Telegram has been successfully linked to your TyPlace account. Telegram notifications are now enabled.

auth.confirmRobot: Please confirm that you are not a robot.
auth.accountNotFoundGoRegister: Account not found. Go to “Sign up”.
auth.emailAlreadyRegisteredGoLogin: This email is already registered. Go to “Login”.
auth.codeForOtherAction: The code was sent for another action.
auth.codeExpired: The code has expired. Click “Get code” again.
auth.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Request a new code.
auth.waitBeforeRetry: Please wait {{seconds}} seconds and try again.

profile.usernameTooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters.
profile.usernameChangeTooEarly: You can change your username only once every 30 days.

settings.telegramNotConfigured: Telegram is not configured on the server

official.readOnlyInRegularList: In the regular list, the official chat is read-only
official.filesNotAllowed: Files cannot be sent to the official chat yet
official.notOfficialChat: This is not an official chat

offers.cloneOnlySold: Only sold offers can be cloned
offers.notAllFieldsFilled: Not all fields are filled in
offers.deletedCannotActivate: A deleted listing cannot be activated
offers.soldCannotActivate: A sold listing cannot be activated
offers.fillTitleForLanguage: Fill in the title for language: {{language}}
offers.fillDescriptionForLanguage: Fill in the description for language: {{language}}

chats.blockedByOther: You are blocked by this user
chats.officialCannotBlock: The official account cannot be blocked

orders.checkoutNotImplemented: The new payment flow has not been connected yet
orders.notParticipant: You are not a participant of this order

reviews.onlyAfterCompleted: A review can only be left after the deal is completed

resolution.onlyResolutionChat: Only Resolution can write to the order chat on behalf of arbitration
resolution.noActiveDispute: There is no active dispute for this order
resolution.assignedToOther: This dispute is assigned to another Resolution employee
resolution.onlyResolutionDecision: Only Resolution can make a decision on the dispute
resolution.alreadyDecided: A decision has already been made for this order
resolution.userHasNoResolutionRole: The user does not have the Resolution role

support.disputeAlreadyOpened: A dispute has already been opened for this order
support.completedAppealBuyer72h: Only the buyer can open an appeal for a completed order within 72 hours after confirmation
support.cannotOpenThisCategory: A request in this category cannot be opened for this order
support.tooManyActiveTickets: You have too many active tickets
support.notOrderDispute: This ticket is not an order dispute
support.cannotReopenOrderDisputeManually: An order dispute cannot be reopened manually
support.ticketAlreadyAssignedToThisEmployee: This ticket is already assigned to this employee
support.ticketAlreadyAssignedOther: This ticket is already assigned to another employee
support.onlyAssignedCanClose: Only a ticket assigned to you can be closed
support.onlyAfterSupportReply: You can close it only after support has replied
support.ticketAlreadyReopened: This ticket has already been reopened. Create a new ticket.

admin.notEnoughRightsSetRole: Not enough permissions to change this role
admin.onlyAdminCanTransferTickets: Only an administrator can transfer tickets
admin.notEnoughRightsBan: Not enough permissions to ban this user

uploads.onlyImagesAndVideos: Only images and videos can be uploaded
uploads.onlyImagesVideosPdf: Only images, videos, and PDF files can be uploaded
